title: Dr. Tenali Rama
desc: Tenali is a talented doctor who works in his family's hospital and helps his worrisome patients with their ailments and diseases.

title: Captain Pepe
desc: Captain Pepe tries to hunt Lilly, a little tortoise, in order to grow his wings back. However, every time he thinks he is close to catching her, she outsmarts him.

title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
desc: The host provides a behind-the-scenes look at Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles, featuring interviews with the cast as well as a ten minute preview of the film.

title: Pat & Mat
desc: Pat and Mat often find themselves in trouble and try to solve their unique problems in haste. Although they try their best, they tend to end up in unexpectedly hilarious situations.

title: Gladiators - The Tournament
desc: Catilius and other people from all parts of the Roman Empire participate in a tournament to win Domitia's hand. Meanwhile, Ali must undergo many trials to learn about his past and his destiny.

title: Smurf
desc: The Smurfs are tiny blue creatures that live in mushroom houses in a peaceful forest. They repeatedly try to outwit Gargamel, an evil sorcerer, his apprentice, Scruple, and his mangy cat, Azrael.

title: Eena Meena Deeka
desc: Three clever chicks constantly outsmart a sly, hungry fox as he hatches schemes that lead to chaotic and hilarious chases across their colourful world.

title: The Beet Party
desc: Five beets, the most adventurous crew in the fridge, enjoy each other's company. However, when a new companion joins their group, they eagerly plan for more adventures.

desc: A collection of kids' favourite moral stories designed for fun, interactive storytelling sessions to educate them while boosting their brain development.
